category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU GRUB bootloader for x86_64-elf; official GNU GRUB manual documents GRUB booting behavior.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x86_64-elf-grub; source_facts.description identifies GNU GRUB bootloader for x86_64-elf.
docs_sources: Official GNU GRUB manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/grub/manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU GRUB download page says releases can be cloned from https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gnu-grub/grub/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names GNU GRUB bootloader and x86_64-elf; source_facts.executables list GRUB command-line tools.
